tree.name: Mouhamed Gueye
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks traded a 2027 2nd round draft pick (ATL own) to Celtics for Mouhamed Gueye.
tree.note: Washington State big, developmental prospect. Originally drafted #39 by BOS in 2023.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick via ATL
assetsGivenUp.note: Atlanta's own 2027 2nd-round pick, sent to Boston for Gueye.
